description: The Ferrari F430, produced from 2004 to 2009, features a naturally aspirated 4.3-litre V8 producing 483 bhp. Widely regarded as one of the finest mid-engine V8 Ferraris, well-maintained examples continue to hold strong value. Manual gearbox cars command a significant premium over F1 automated variants.
